ground_truth.title: Should You Buy a Used Rental Car? - Consumer Reports
ground_truth.author: Benjamin Preston
ground_truth.main_content: Consumer Reports provides guidance on whether buying a used rental car is a wise purchase decision. Rental cars typically have been well-maintained and come from major rental companies like Hertz and Enterprise. However, they may have higher mileage and potentially harder use from multiple renters. The article advises readers to take specific steps if considering a former rental car purchase, including getting a thorough pre-purchase inspection and reviewing vehicle history reports. Potential buyers should carefully weigh the pros and cons, including pricing, warranty coverage, and any hidden wear and tear before making a decision.
with: Should You Buy a Used Rental Car?
CR advises you on the pros and cons of buying a used rental car.
It can be a savvy move—if you take the right steps.
Rental cars have typically been well-maintained and come from major rental companies.
The article discusses Hertz, Enterprise, warranty, and inspection considerations.
